_comment: Modder-extension example. Maps a vanilla ender pearl, placed in the right slot of an anvil opposite a Smithery tool, to the smithery:ender_affinity modifier (30% chance on hit to teleport the target ~4 blocks). The behaviour itself is registered in code in EnderExampleContent.java; this file maps a source ITEM to it. Modpacks can override by shipping their own JSON at the same path in a datapack.
